user.title: Vivertine Gym
user.description: Connect to your Vivertine (PerfectGym) account to monitor your membership, classes, and visits.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data (60-3600 seconds, default 300)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to PerfectGym API. Please try again later.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials.

abort.already_configured: This Vivertine account is already configured.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data (60-3600 seconds)
data_description.favorite_classes: Class type names to monitor, e.g. 'Cycling, Yoga, TRX'
data_description.favorite_instructors: Instructor names to monitor, e.g. 'Ana Popescu, Mihai Ion'
data_description.notify_service: HA notify service name, e.g. 'mobile_app_iphone' (leave empty to disable)
data_description.low_spots_threshold: Alert when available spots drop below this number (1-30)
data_description.expiry_reminder_days: Comma-separated days before expiry to send reminders (e.g. '60,30,14,7')
data_description.expiry_daily_threshold: Send daily reminders when days left is at or below this number (1-30)
data_description.busyness_window_hours: Time window for gym busyness estimation (1-8 hours)
data_description.disable_persistent_notifications: When enabled, alerts are sent only to your phone (no HA notifications panel)

send_test_notification.name: Send Test Notification
send_test_notification.description: Send a test notification to verify the Vivertine alert system is working.

book_class.name: Book Class
book_class.description: Book a class at Vivertine gym by its class ID.

class_id.name: Class ID
class_id.description: The numeric ID of the class to book.

cancel_booking.name: Cancel Booking
cancel_booking.description: Cancel an existing class booking by its booking ID.

class_booking_id.name: Class Booking ID
class_booking_id.description: The numeric ID of the booking to cancel.
